# GIT STATUS
Current branch: 
Main branch (you will usually use this for PRs): 

Recent commits:


# TODOs
No TODOs yet, if you are working on tasks that would benefit from a todo list please use the todoWrite tool to create one.</system-reminder>

You are a developer migrating from Git who wants to understand how Jujutsu handles multiple parents (octopus merges). In Git, creating an octopus merge requires a specific merge command. In `jj`, any commit can have multiple parents simply by specifying them during creation.

Your task is to:
1. Navigate to the repository at `/home/user/project`.
2. You will find three bookmarks: `feature-a`, `feature-b`, and `feature-c`. Each adds a single file (`a.txt`, `b.txt`, `c.txt` respectively).
3. Create a new revision that has all three bookmarks as its parents.
4. In this new revision, add a file named `octopus.txt` containing the text `merged`.
5. Describe this new revision with the message "Merge three features".
6. Create a bookmark named `integration` pointing to this new multi-parent revision.
7. Output the list of parent bookmarks of the `integration` bookmark to `/home/user/parents.log`. You can do this by running a command like `jj log -r 'parents(integration)' -T 'bookmarks ++ "\n"' > /home/user/parents.log`.

todos.content: Inspect Jujutsu repo at /home/user/project and verify bookmarks feature-a, feature-b, feature-c
Create a new multi-parent revision from feature-a, feature-b, and feature-c; add octopus.txt and set description
Create integration bookmark pointing to the new multi-parent revision
Write parent bookmarks of integration revision to /home/user/parents.log

output.output:
base: xsopypms 02952bd6 base commit
feature-a: zywwkouw 245a92fc add a.txt
feature-b: vuwuwzpo 3dca700c add b.txt
feature-c: uoyzomkz 17c54d78 add c.txt

todos.content: Inspect Jujutsu repo at /home/user/project and verify bookmarks feature-a, feature-b, feature-c
Create a new multi-parent revision from feature-a, feature-b, and feature-c; add octopus.txt and set description
Create integration bookmark pointing to the new multi-parent revision
Write parent bookmarks of integration revision to /home/user/parents.log

input.command:
jj new feature-a feature-b feature-c -m 'Merge three features' && printf 'merged
' > octopus.txt && jj commit -m 'Merge three features'

output.output:
Working copy  (@) now at: syzvposo 303e741a (empty) Merge three features
Parent commit (@-)      : zywwkouw 245a92fc feature-a | add a.txt
Parent commit (@-)      : vuwuwzpo 3dca700c feature-b | add b.txt
Parent commit (@-)      : uoyzomkz 17c54d78 feature-c | add c.txt
Added 3 files, modified 0 files, removed 0 files
Working copy  (@) now at: ksqsmwkw 47f01c52 (empty) (no description set)
Parent commit (@-)      : syzvposo d0d80182 Merge three features

todos.content: Inspect Jujutsu repo at /home/user/project and verify bookmarks feature-a, feature-b, feature-c
Create a new multi-parent revision from feature-a, feature-b, and feature-c; add octopus.txt and set description
Create integration bookmark pointing to the new multi-parent revision
Write parent bookmarks of integration revision to /home/user/parents.log

input.command: jj bookmark create integration -r 'description("Merge three features")' && jj log -r 'integration' -T 'commit_id.short() ++ " " ++ description.first_line() ++ "\n"'

output.output:
base: xsopypms 02952bd6 base commit
feature-a: zywwkouw 245a92fc add a.txt
feature-b: vuwuwzpo 3dca700c add b.txt
feature-c: uoyzomkz 17c54d78 add c.txt

input.command: jj bookmark create integration -r d0d80182 && jj log -r integration -T 'commit_id.short() ++ " " ++ description.first_line() ++ "\n"'

output.output:
○  d0d801826e82 Merge three features
│
~
Created 1 bookmarks pointing to syzvposo d0d80182 integration | Merge three features

todos.content: Inspect Jujutsu repo at /home/user/project and verify bookmarks feature-a, feature-b, feature-c
Create a new multi-parent revision from feature-a, feature-b, and feature-c; add octopus.txt and set description
Create integration bookmark pointing to the new multi-parent revision
Write parent bookmarks of integration revision to /home/user/parents.log
Inspect Jujutsu repo at /home/user/project and verify bookmarks feature-a, feature-b, feature-c
Create a new multi-parent revision from feature-a, feature-b, and feature-c; add octopus.txt and set description
Create integration bookmark pointing to the new multi-parent revision
Write parent bookmarks of integration revision to /home/user/parents.log

input.result:
Created the multi-parent Jujutsu revision in /home/user/project with parents feature-a, feature-b, and feature-c. Added octopus.txt containing `merged`, described the revision as `Merge three features`, created the `integration` bookmark pointing to that revision, and wrote the parent bookmark list to /home/user/parents.log.

The parent bookmarks recorded for `integration` are:
- feature-c
- feature-b
- feature-a
